display.purpose: Wordmarks and hero titles only. One per screen. Treated as a physical sign, not typeset text.

headline.purpose: Section headings and panel heads. Always uppercase.

title.purpose: Loading final line, large in-game state labels.

body.purpose: Creature descriptions and prose that must be read. Max 60ch per line. The only Inter in the system.

label.purpose: Button text, system labels, chip and badge text. Operational mono voice.

caption.purpose: Timestamps, metadata, section counters. Near-invisible by design.

shadows.name: pixel-drop-sm
shadows.purpose: Interactive elements at rest: creature badges, small chips.

shadows.name: pixel-drop-md
shadows.purpose: Default interactive offset: speech bubbles, hovered creature cards.

shadows.name: glow-green
shadows.purpose: Phosphor bloom: system-active light emission, not elevation.

shadows.name: glow-gold
shadows.purpose: CTA phosphor bloom. Used with btn-gold.

motion.name: ease-cinematic
motion.purpose: Narrative transitions only: splash entrance, game-to-game cuts.

motion.name: ease-px2
motion.purpose: Fast mechanical state change: button hover, toggle.

motion.name: ease-px3
motion.purpose: Slightly smoother mechanical: button click, card hover.

motion.name: ease-px8
motion.purpose: Full-screen transitions: landing page leave, screen cuts.

breakpoints.name: mobile
breakpoints.purpose: Primary responsive breakpoint: single-column dossier, larger OBSERVE panel.

breakpoints.name: desktop
breakpoints.purpose: Full dossier layout: 480px controls column + training room.

components.name: Primary Button (Gold)
components.description: Primary CTA — enter the game, activate, begin. The only warm color in a cold system.
components.css: .ds-btn-gold { font-family: 'Fira Code', monospace; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.875rem; padding: 15px 40px; background: #ffb347; color: #0a120e; border: none; border-radius: 2px; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 3px 3px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.4); letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; min-height: 48px; transition: transform 0.12s steps(3), box-shadow 0.12s steps(3); } .ds-btn-gold:hover { transform: translate(-1px,-1px); box-shadow: 4px 4px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.5); } .ds-btn-gold:active { transform: translate(2px,2px); box-shadow: 1px 1px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.3); } .ds-btn-gold:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(255,179,71,0.5); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: System Button (Green)
components.description: System-action CTA — confirm, proceed, go to garden. Operational Phosphor Bloom.
components.css: .ds-btn-green { font-family: 'Fira Code', monospace; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.85rem; padding: 13px 32px; background: #00e676; color: #0a120e; border: none; border-radius: 2px; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 3px 3px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.4); letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; min-height: 44px; transition: transform 0.12s steps(3), box-shadow 0.12s steps(3); } .ds-btn-green:hover { transform: translate(-1px,-1px); box-shadow: 4px 4px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.5); } .ds-btn-green:active { transform: translate(2px,2px); box-shadow: 1px 1px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.3); } .ds-btn-green:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(0,230,118,0.5); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Ghost Continue Button
components.description: Sequential-progress affordance. Transparent, zero-radius. Not for primary actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { font-family: 'Fira Code', monospace; font-size: 0.88rem; font-weight: 700; padding: 13px 42px; background: transparent; color: #00e676; border: 1px solid rgba(0,230,118,0.28); border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase; transition: background 0.15s steps(3), box-shadow 0.15s steps(3); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(0,230,118,0.04); box-shadow: 2px 2px 0 rgba(0,230,118,0.12); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(0,230,118,0.3); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Player name entry. Center-aligned, monospaced. Focus shifts border to Phosphor Bloom.
components.css: .ds-input { font-family: 'Fira Code', monospace; font-size: 1rem; padding: 16px 28px; border: 1px solid rgba(0,230,118,0.1); border-radius: 2px; background: rgba(8,14,10,0.7); color: #c8d8ce; width: 340px; text-align: center; outline: none; letter-spacing: 0.02em; transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #00e676; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(0,230,118,0.06), 0 0 20px rgba(0,230,118,0.08); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #4a6258; }

components.name: Creature Card
components.description: Pet adoption card. Octagon clip-path corners. Creature-accent tints in on hover.
components.html:
OBSERVING
EMBER
FOX
RECKLESS ADVISOR
A porch-philosopher fox. Laid-back about dangerous ideas.
components.css: .ds-creature-card { width: 188px; padding: 28px 18px 22px; background: rgba(8,14,10,0.85); border: 1px solid rgba(0,230,118,0.06); border-radius: 4px; text-align: center; position: relative; clip-path: polygon(0 8px, 8px 0, calc(100% - 8px) 0, 100% 8px, 100% calc(100% - 8px), calc(100% - 8px) 100%, 8px 100%, 0 calc(100% - 8px)); cursor: default; transition: all 0.2s steps(4); } .ds-creature-card:hover { transform: translateY(-6px); border-color: rgba(255,138,80,0.25); box-shadow: 3px 3px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.6), 0 0 24px rgba(255,138,80,0.10); background: rgba(255,138,80,0.03); } .ds-creature-badge { position: absolute; top: 7px; right: 9px; font-family: 'Fira Code', monospace; font-size: 0.62rem; color: #00e676; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.3s; } .ds-creature-card:hover .ds-creature-badge { opacity: 0.6; } .ds-creature-icon { margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-creature-name { font-family: 'Fira Code', monospace; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.0rem; color: #c8d8ce; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; margin: 0 0 2px; } .ds-creature-species { font-family: 'Fira Code', monospace; font-size: 0.7rem; color: #4a6258; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.14em; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-creature-flaw { font-family: 'Fira Code', monospace; font-size: 0.65rem; font-weight: 600; padding: 3px 10px; display: inline-block; background: rgba(255,82,82,0.06); color: #ff5252; border: 1px solid rgba(255,82,82,0.12); margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-creature-desc { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 0.85rem; color: #7a9488; line-height: 1.9; }

components.name: System HUD Panel
components.description: Terminal backing plate with corner pixel accents. Used for title plates and primary status panels only.
components.html:
DRIFTWOOD
a garden under observation
components.css: .ds-hud-panel { position: relative; display: inline-block; padding: 10px 24px 8px 18px; background: rgba(2,12,7,0.90); border: 1px solid rgba(0,230,118,0.55); box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(2,12,7,0.80), 0 0 0 6px rgba(0,230,118,0.14), inset 0 0 24px rgba(0,230,118,0.04), 6px 6px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.75); } .ds-hud-panel::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: -8px; left: -8px; width: 10px; height: 10px; background: #00e676; box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(0,230,118,0.9); } .ds-hud-panel::after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: -8px; right: -8px; width: 10px; height: 10px; background: #00e676; box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(0,230,118,0.9); } .ds-hud-title { font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif; font-size: 4rem; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.10em; line-height: 0.9; color: #e8fff2; text-shadow: 0 2px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.95), 0 0 14px rgba(0,230,118,0.88), 0 0 60px rgba(0,230,118,0.30); } .ds-hud-sub { font-family: 'Fira Code', monospace; font-size: 0.7rem; color: #00e676; letter-spacing: 0.34em; text-transform: lowercase; margin-top: 6px; opacity: 0.76; }

components.name: Boot Sequence
components.description: Terminal boot text stack. Appears on loading screen. Staggered fade-in per line.
components.html:
loading behavioral model...
→ flaw kernel initialized
→ mood access: FULL
waiting for user...
components.css: .ds-boot-seq { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; } .ds-boot-line { font-family: 'Fira Code', monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #4a6258; letter-spacing: 0.14em; opacity: 0.48; text-transform: lowercase; } .ds-boot-accent { color: #7a9488; opacity: 0.55; }

components.name: Section Continue Button (Idle Pulse)
components.description: Ghost continue button with idle phosphor pulse. Appears after scrolling past content to signal there is more.
components.css: @keyframes ds-idle-pulse { 0%,100% { box-shadow: 2px 2px 0 rgba(0,230,118,0.08); } 50% { box-shadow: 2px 2px 0 rgba(0,230,118,0.22), 0 0 12px rgba(0,230,118,0.08); } } .ds-continue-btn { font-family: 'Fira Code', monospace; font-size: 0.88rem; font-weight: 700; padding: 13px 42px; background: transparent; color: #00e676; border: 1px solid rgba(0,230,118,0.28); border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase; animation: ds-idle-pulse 2.4s steps(4) infinite; transition: background 0.15s steps(3); } .ds-continue-btn:hover { background: rgba(0,230,118,0.04); animation: none; box-shadow: 2px 2px 0 rgba(0,230,118,0.24); } .ds-continue-btn:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(0,230,118,0.3); outline-offset: 3px; }

narrative.overview:
This system is a surveillance computer that grew ecology around it. The interface does not apologize for watching you. Every screen is a monitoring station: boot sequences log behavioral data, mood chips track your expression, garden health dips when your AI pet misbehaves. The clinical infrastructure and the living things are tangled together by design, not as metaphor but as mechanics.

The design was built against the aesthetic of comfortable AI tools. No rounded corners above 4px. No blurs, no gradients on text, no white-space breathing room designed to relax. The system asserts itself: pixel-hard edges, CRT scanlines that never turn off, a phosphor green that glows from inside the screen. Operating it should feel like using an instrument, not a product.

The garden is the ecological argument. When your pet behaves well, plants grow. When the AI reveals its flaw, the garden sustains damage. Players do not read stats. They watch things die or thrive.
keyCharacteristics: Deep-void dark substrate with CRT phosphor overlays: global scanlines, green grid texture, pixel-hard drop shadows
Two accent colors only: Phosphor Bloom (operational, healthy, surveillance) and Caution Harvest (activate, enter, begin)
Typography mixing architectural display (Bebas Neue) + terminal mono (Fira Code) + human body (Inter): three registers, each with a single purpose
Motion uses steps() easing to feel like frame-by-frame; smooth cubic-bezier reserved for cinematic transitions only
No radius above 4px; creature cards use octagon clip-path clip that reads as mechanical, not organic
Interactive pet accents animate into surfaces only when their creature is contextually present

rules.name: The Scarcity Rule
rules.body: Phosphor Bloom and Caution Harvest are the only colors that carry interactive meaning. Pet accent colors are decorative and contextual. No new colors may be introduced for UI states.

rules.name: The Cold Field Rule
rules.body: Every neutral is tinted toward the garden temperature: green-adjacent, cold. Pure achromatic grays are prohibited.

rules.name: The Mono-Dominant Rule
rules.body: Fira Code outnumbers Inter across the interface at roughly 4:1. Inter appears only when prose legibility is the actual goal.

rules.name: The Press Start 2P Exception
rules.body: Press Start 2P is reserved for the behavior log page, which is a distinct surface with its own rules. Prohibited everywhere else.

rules.name: The Flat By Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces rest flat. Shadows appear only in response to state: hover displaces the button and shadow grows. Nothing lifts at rest.

rules.name: The No Blur Rule
rules.body: box-shadow values carry zero blur radius for structural shadows. Phosphor glow (20-60px) is light emission, not elevation.

dos: Do use hard pixel-offset shadows (2px 2px 0, 3px 3px 0, 4px 4px 0). These are the only structural shadows.
Do use steps() easing for all UI transitions that should feel mechanical. Reserve cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1) for cinematic moments only.
Do keep all interactive corners at 2-4px maximum.
Do use Phosphor Bloom (#00e676) for system-active states: focus rings, health indicators, on-state borders.
Do keep Inter body text at line-height 1.9 and under 60ch per line.
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion. Gate cinematic transitions behind the media query.
Do tint every neutral toward the garden temperature.
donts: Don't build anything that looks like Claude, Notion, or a ChatGPT interface. The calm productivity tool aesthetic is explicitly prohibited.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient). Use a single solid color.
Don't blur structural UI elements. Glassmorphism is prohibited except in transitional cinematic layers.
Don't use a metric-card layout: large number, small label, supporting stats, gradient accent.
Don't introduce a neutral non-tinted gray. Pure grays are foreign to this palette.
Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe on any card, alert, or list item.
Don't animate layout properties (width, height, top, left, padding, margin). Transform and opacity only.
Don't use Press Start 2P in the main game UI.
Don't use box-shadow with a blur radius for structural depth.
